question: A 'frame narrative' is
options: The world of the story as experienced by its characters
A story within a story where an outer narrative introduces an inner one
Wayne Booth
It addresses a silent listener and reveals character indirectly
answer: A story within a story where an outer narrative introduces an inner one

question: 'Metafiction' is writing that
options: A society where oppression and suffering are normalised
A flash-forward that anticipates future events
Self-consciously draws attention to its own fictional nature
A roguish hero through loosely connected episodic adventures
answer: Self-consciously draws attention to its own fictional nature

The imitation or representation of reality
answer: The world of the story as experienced by its characters
